title: Established Cleaning Service | Semi-Absentee Ownership | Scalable
description:
This reputable cleaning service represents a rare opportunity to acquire a well-established business with strong brand recognition, loyal clientele, and significant room for expansion. The current owner operates in a semi-absentee capacity—approximately 75% removed from daily operations—making this a smooth and turnkey transition for a hands-on operator or investor. Built on a foundation of quality, consistency, and reliability, the business services a loyal mix of residential and commercial clients with recurring contracts that provide steady, predictable revenue. Its reputation for professionalism and customer satisfaction continues to drive referrals and repeat business. This is an ideal acquisition for an owner-operator ready to step into a business that’s already running efficiently but has untapped potential to grow. With a strong team in place, established systems, and scalable operations, there is ample opportunity to add new service crews, expand into additional markets, and increase marketing to capture growing demand.

Highlights:
Owner 75% removed from daily operations
Two branded company vehicles included, supporting efficient operations and reinforcing the business's professional image Strong brand with excellent reputation and online presence
Established recurring client base with consistent cash flow
Trained team and operational systems in place
Scalable model—add crews, expand territory, and grow revenues Ideal for an owner-operator or investor looking for a proven platform to scale

This business offers more than just a steady income—it’s a foundation for growth. With structure, brand recognition, and loyal customers already in place, a motivated new owner can immediately step in, expand crews, and scale into a multi-location operation. Opportunities like this—where the hard work of building the brand and reputation is already done—don’t come along often.

Ad#:2433806
